{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged hunger
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]]' mouth is filled with fangs of [[Forged hunger]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
